title: Outdated Webhook node causing no response
symptom: The webhook keeps waiting indefinitely when trying to test it, and the logs indicate that the webhook is not registered. The user experiences a 404 error when attempting to access the webhook URL.
applies_when: Using an outdated version of the Webhook node
not_this_if: Webhook node is up to date
root_cause: The Webhook node was created with an older version, which may not be compatible with the current n8n setup. This can lead to the webhook not being recognized or responding as expected.
fix_steps: Update the Webhook node to the latest version
Ensure the workflow is activated after the update
Test the webhook again using the correct URL
agent_instruction: Update the Webhook node to the latest version and test the webhook again.
